problem.title: Graph Representation Using Adjacency Matrix
problem.description:
Problem: Build a graph with n vertices and m edges using adjacency matrix representation.
The graph may be directed or undirected.

Input:
- n (vertices)
- m (edges)
- m pairs (u, v)

Output:
- n x n adjacency matrix

solution.explanation: Read n and m, build a 2‑D array of size 101×101, set entries for each edge, then print the matrix row by row.
